scripts.build: npm run build -w @logistics/shared && npm run build -w @logistics/backend && npm run build -w @logistics/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @logistics/shared && npm run typecheck -w @logistics/backend && npm run typecheck -w @logistics/frontend
scripts.test:backend: npm run prisma:deploy -w @logistics/backend && npm run db:seed -w @logistics/backend && npm run test -w @logistics/backend
scripts.test:frontend: npm run db:seed -w @logistics/backend && npm run test:e2e -w @logistics/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
